# Claude Code prompt — [5A.2] Quote PDF — update IS logo asset

*Paste everything below the line into Claude Code. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-26.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow
it. This is a small **asset-only** PR — the IS logo `teal_sq_logo4x.png` was
badly cropped; the owner has replaced it with a corrected version. Get the
updated logo onto `main`.

## Context — no code change

The quote PDF builder reads the logo from disk at render time: `logoBase64()`
in `apps/api/src/modules/pdf-rendering/builders/quote-html.builder.ts` reads
`templates/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png` and embeds it as base64 in the header,
and the page watermark uses the same file. So replacing the PNG **is** the
whole fix — do not change any code.

## What is already done (working tree on `main`)

The owner has already replaced two tracked copies of the logo — both currently
show as modified (` M`) and uncommitted:

- `apps/api/src/modules/pdf-rendering/templates/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png` —
  the copy the quote header and watermark use.
- `apps/api/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png` — a second copy.

(`apps/api/dist/...` also has a copy — it is a gitignored build artifact;
ignore it, the build regenerates it from source.)

## Phase 0 — pre-work

- `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`: `fix/quote-logo-update`.
- The two modified logo files are working-tree changes — they carry over to
  the new branch.

## Regenerate the sample PDFs

- Build the API so the asset-copy step refreshes
  `dist/.../templates/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png` from the new source, then
  regenerate both `docs/samples/` quote PDFs so they carry the new logo:
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf` and
  `docs/samples/sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`.

## Commit — ONLY these four files, staged explicitly

The working tree also contains untracked directories (`docs/diagnostics/...`,
`docs/pr-prompts/`) — these are local-only working files and must **NOT** be
committed.

- Stage only, explicitly:
  - `apps/api/src/modules/pdf-rendering/templates/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png`
  - `apps/api/assets/teal_sq_logo4x.png`
  - `docs/samples/sample-quote-tender-level.pdf`
  - `docs/samples/sample-quote-with-overlay.pdf`
- Do **NOT** use `git add .` or `git add -A`.
- Before committing, run `git diff --cached --stat` — it must list exactly
  those four files and nothing else. `git status` should still show the
  `docs/diagnostics/...` and `docs/pr-prompts/` directories as untracked;
  leave them untracked.

## Gate

- Run the §6 pre-PR CI checklist; build, lint and tests must be green. This is
